003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
022
023import java.lang.annotation.*;
024import java.net.*;
025import java.util.*;
026import java.util.function.*;
027import java.util.stream.*;
028
029import org.apache.juneau.commons.collections.*;
030import org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.*;
031
032/**
033 * Lightweight wrapper around a {@link Package} object providing convenient access to package metadata and annotations.
034 *
035 * <p>
036 * This class provides a cached wrapper around Java {@link Package} objects, extending the standard API with
037 * convenient methods for accessing package annotations and metadata. Instances are cached and reused for efficiency.
038 *
039 * <h5 class='section'>Features:</h5>
040 * <ul class='spaced-list'>
041 *    <li>Cached instances - package info objects are cached and reused
042 *    <li>Annotation support - get annotations declared on the package
043 *    <li>Convenient access - easy access to package name and metadata
044 *    <li>Thread-safe - instances are immutable and safe for concurrent access
045 * </ul>
046 *
047 * <h5 class='section'>Use Cases:</h5>
048 * <ul class='spaced-list'>
049 *    <li>Accessing package-level annotations
050 *    <li>Working with package metadata
051 *    <li>Building frameworks that need to analyze package information
052 * </ul>
053 *
054 * <h5 class='section'>Usage:</h5>
055 * <p class='bjava'>
056 *    <jc>// Get PackageInfo from a class</jc>
057 *    PackageInfo <jv>pi</jv> = PackageInfo.<jsm>of</jsm>(MyClass.<jk>class</jk>);
058 *
059 *    <jc>// Get package name</jc>
060 *    String <jv>name</jv> = <jv>pi</jv>.getName();
061 *
062 *    <jc>// Get annotations</jc>
063 *    List&lt;AnnotationInfo&lt;MyAnnotation&gt;&gt; <jv>annotations</jv> =
064 *       <jv>pi</jv>.getAnnotations(MyAnnotation.<jk>class</jk>).toList();
065 * </p>
066 *
067 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
068 *    <li class='jc'>{@link ClassInfo} - Class introspection
069 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/JuneauCommonsReflection">Reflection Package</a>
070 * </ul>
071 */
072@SuppressWarnings({
073   "java:S115" // Constants use UPPER_snakeCase convention
074})
075public class PackageInfo implements Annotatable {
076
077   // Argument name constants for assertArgNotNull
078   private static final String ARG_inner = "inner";
079
080   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
081   // Static
082   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
083
084   private static final Cache<Package,PackageInfo> CACHE = Cache.of(Package.class, PackageInfo.class).build();
085
086   /**
087    * Returns a package info wrapper around the package of the specified class.
088    *
089    * @param childClass The class whose package to retrieve.
090    * @return A package info wrapper.
091    */
092   public static PackageInfo of(Class<?> childClass) {
093      return of(childClass.getPackage());
094   }
095
096   /**
097    * Returns a package info wrapper around the package of the specified class info.
098    *
099    * @param childClass The class info whose package to retrieve.
100    * @return A package info wrapper.
101    */
102   public static PackageInfo of(ClassInfo childClass) {
103      return childClass.getPackage();
104   }
105
106   /**
107    * Returns a package info wrapper around the specified package object.
108    *
109    * @param inner The package object.
110    * @return A package info wrapper.
111    */
112   public static PackageInfo of(Package inner) {
113      return CACHE.get(inner, () -> new PackageInfo(inner));
114   }
115
116   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
117   // Instance
118   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
119
120   private final Package inner;
121   private final Supplier<List<AnnotationInfo<Annotation>>> annotations;  // All annotations on this package, wrapped in AnnotationInfo. Repeated annotations have been unwrapped and are present as individual instances.
122
123   /**
124    * Constructor.
125    *
126    * @param inner The package object.
127    */
128   protected PackageInfo(Package inner) {
129      assertArgNotNull(ARG_inner, inner);
130      this.inner = inner;
131      this.annotations = memoize(
132         () -> opt(inner).map(pkg -> stream(pkg.getAnnotations()).flatMap(AnnotationUtils::streamRepeated).map(a -> AnnotationInfo.of(this, a)).toList()).orElse(liste()));
133   }
134
135   /**
136    * Returns <jk>true</jk> if the specified object is equal to this package.
137    *
138    * <p>
139    * Two packages are equal if they have the same name.
140    *
141    * @param obj The object to compare to.
142    * @return <jk>true</jk> if the specified object is equal to this package.
143    */
144   @Override /* Object */
145   public boolean equals(Object obj) {
146      if (obj instanceof PackageInfo obj2)
147         return inner.equals(obj2.inner);
148      return inner.equals(obj);
149   }
150
151   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
152   // Package methods
153   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
154
155   @Override /* Annotatable */
156   public AnnotatableType getAnnotatableType() { return AnnotatableType.PACKAGE_TYPE; }
157
158   /**
159    * Returns all annotations on this package, wrapped in {@link AnnotationInfo} objects.
160    *
161    * <p>
162    * Cached and unmodifiable.
163    * Repeated annotations (from {@code @Repeatable} containers) have been automatically unwrapped and are present as individual instances in the list.
164    *
165    * @return All annotations present on this package, or an empty list if there are none.
166    */
167   public List<AnnotationInfo<Annotation>> getAnnotations() { return annotations.get(); }
168
169   /**
170    * Returns this package's annotations of the specified type (including repeated annotations), wrapped in {@link AnnotationInfo}.
171    *
172    * <p>
173    * Filters the cached annotations list by type.
174    *
175    * @param <A> The annotation type.
176    * @param type The annotation type.
177    * @return A stream of annotation infos of the specified type, never <jk>null</jk>.
178    */
179   @SuppressWarnings({
180      "unchecked" // Type erasure requires cast for annotation stream
181   })
182   public <A extends Annotation> Stream<AnnotationInfo<A>> getAnnotations(Class<A> type) {
183      return getAnnotations().stream().filter(ai -> type.isInstance(ai.inner())).map(ai -> (AnnotationInfo<A>)ai);
184   }
185
186   /**
187    * Returns the title of this package's implementation.
188    *
189    * <p>
190    * Same as calling {@link Package#getImplementationTitle()}.
191    *
192    * @return The implementation title, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not known.
193    * @see Package#getImplementationTitle()
194    */
195   public String getImplementationTitle() { return inner.getImplementationTitle(); }
196
197   /**
198    * Returns the name of the organization that provided this package's implementation.
199    *
200    * <p>
201    * Same as calling {@link Package#getImplementationVendor()}.
202    *
203    * @return The implementation vendor, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not known.
204    * @see Package#getImplementationVendor()
205    */
206   public String getImplementationVendor() { return inner.getImplementationVendor(); }
207
208   /**
209    * Returns the version of this package's implementation.
210    *
211    * <p>
212    * Same as calling {@link Package#getImplementationVersion()}.
213    *
214    * @return The implementation version, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not known.
215    * @see Package#getImplementationVersion()
216    */
217   public String getImplementationVersion() { return inner.getImplementationVersion(); }
218
219   @Override /* Annotatable */
220   public String getLabel() { return getName(); }
221
222   /**
223    * Returns the name of this package.
224    *
225    * <p>
226    * Same as calling {@link Package#getName()}.
227    *
228    * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
229    * <p class='bjava'>
230    *    PackageInfo <jv>pi</jv> = PackageInfo.<jsm>of</jsm>(String.<jk>class</jk>);
231    *    String <jv>name</jv> = <jv>pi</jv>.getName();  <jc>// "java.lang"</jc>
232    * </p>
233    *
234    * @return The fully-qualified name of this package.
235    * @see Package#getName()
236    */
237   public String getName() { return inner.getName(); }
238
239   /**
240    * Returns the title of the specification that this package implements.
241    *
242    * <p>
243    * Same as calling {@link Package#getSpecificationTitle()}.
244    *
245    * @return The specification title, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not known.
246    * @see Package#getSpecificationTitle()
247    */
248   public String getSpecificationTitle() { return inner.getSpecificationTitle(); }
249
250   /**
251    * Returns the name of the organization that maintains the specification implemented by this package.
252    *
253    * <p>
254    * Same as calling {@link Package#getSpecificationVendor()}.
255    *
256    * @return The specification vendor, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not known.
257    * @see Package#getSpecificationVendor()
258    */
259   public String getSpecificationVendor() { return inner.getSpecificationVendor(); }
260
261   /**
262    * Returns the version number of the specification that this package implements.
263    *
264    * <p>
265    * Same as calling {@link Package#getSpecificationVersion()}.
266    *
267    * <p>
268    * This version string must be a sequence of nonnegative decimal integers separated by periods
269    * and may have leading zeros.
270    *
271    * @return The specification version, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not known.
272    * @see Package#getSpecificationVersion()
273    */
274   public String getSpecificationVersion() { return inner.getSpecificationVersion(); }
275
276   /**
277    * Returns the hash code of this package.
278    *
279    * <p>
280    * Same as calling {@link Package#hashCode()}.
281    *
282    * @return The hash code of this package.
283    */
284   @Override /* Object */
285   public int hashCode() {
286      return inner.hashCode();
287   }
288
289   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
290   // Object methods
291   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
292
293   /**
294    * Returns the wrapped {@link Package} object.
295    *
296    * @return The wrapped {@link Package} object.
297    */
298   public Package inner() {
299      return inner;
300   }
301
302   /**
303    * Compares this package's specification version with a desired version.
304    *
305    * <p>
306    * Same as calling {@link Package#isCompatibleWith(String)}.
307    *
308    * <p>
309    * The version strings are compared by comparing each decimal integer in the version string.
310    *
311    * @param desired The desired version.
312    * @return <jk>true</jk> if this package's specification version is compatible with the desired version.
313    * @throws NumberFormatException If the desired or current version is not in the correct format.
314    * @see Package#isCompatibleWith(String)
315    */
316   public boolean isCompatibleWith(String desired) throws NumberFormatException {
317      return inner.isCompatibleWith(desired);  // HTT - Hard to test normal return path: requires package with version set in JAR manifest (Specification-Version header), which is difficult to set in test environment
318   }
319
320   /**
321    * Returns <jk>true</jk> if this package is sealed.
322    *
323    * <p>
324    * Same as calling {@link Package#isSealed()}.
325    *
326    * @return <jk>true</jk> if this package is sealed.
327    * @see Package#isSealed()
328    */
329   public boolean isSealed() { return inner.isSealed(); }
330
331   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
332   // Annotatable interface methods
333   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
334
335   /**
336    * Returns <jk>true</jk> if this package is sealed with respect to the specified code source URL.
337    *
338    * <p>
339    * Same as calling {@link Package#isSealed(URL)}.
340    *
341    * @param url The code source URL.
342    * @return <jk>true</jk> if this package is sealed with respect to the specified URL.
343    * @see Package#isSealed(URL)
344    */
345   public boolean isSealed(URL url) {
346      return inner.isSealed(url);
347   }
348
349   /**
350    * Returns the string representation of this package.
351    *
352    * <p>
353    * Same as calling {@link Package#toString()}.
354    *
355    * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
356    * <p class='bjava'>
357    *    PackageInfo <jv>pi</jv> = PackageInfo.<jsm>of</jsm>(String.<jk>class</jk>);
358    *    String <jv>s</jv> = <jv>pi</jv>.toString();  <jc>// "package java.lang"</jc>
359    * </p>
360    *
361    * @return The string representation of this package.
362    * @see Package#toString()
363    */
364   @Override /* Object */
365   public String toString() {
366      return inner.toString();
367   }
368}
